summary: Implemented WorkoutSession, WorkoutExercise, and WorkoutSet repositories with CRUD operations, domain-specific queries, session_status state machine, and is_target_met computation. All 50 integration tests pass with in-memory SQLite.
keyDecisions: WorkoutSession state machine enforces valid transitions: in_progress -> completed | completed_partial, terminal states reject further transitions
is_target_met computed on insert when actual_reps is provided: actual_reps >= target_reps => 1, else 0; null actual_reps => null is_target_met
WorkoutSetRepo.createSet uses WorkoutSetCreateData type that allows optional is_target_met to support both computed and explicit values
All query methods return results in domain-relevant order: sessions by date, exercises by order_index, sets by set_index

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: workout-session.repo.ts implements CRUD with findByDate, findByDateRange, findByStatus, findByTrainingType
workout-exercise.repo.ts implements CRUD with findBySessionBizKey, findByExerciseBizKey
WorkoutSession supports session_status state machine: in_progress -> completed / completed_partial
Integration tests with in-memory SQLite pass for all CRUD operations

notes: All three workout repositories follow the established pattern from task 1.3 (base repository + factory function). Full cross-entity integration test covers session -> exercise -> set flow including partial completion and backlog scenarios.
